tasks.title: Promote staged curation migrations 01–04 into the live migration tree
tasks.dod: All four staged up/down pairs are promoted, apply and revert cleanly on a real MySQL, and the schema constraints (UNIQUE flow 1:1, single primary star, scene-link cascade) hold

tasks.title: Implement extraction-job + reference-block repositories (atomic window claim, CAS version)
tasks.dod: Integration tests against real MySQL pass for job CRUD, block CRUD in cast order, atomic claim of the next pending block per draft, and compare-and-set version increment

tasks.title: Implement stars + scene-links repositories (idempotent toggle, primary uniqueness, cascade)
tasks.dod: Integration tests pass for idempotent star toggle, at-most-one primary per block, links replace-set under CAS, and scene-deletion cascade removing links with no dangling rows

tasks.title: Build cast-extraction service: start (owner-scoped, AC-01b guard) + get proposal
tasks.dod: Unit/integration tests pass: start creates a job row and enqueues on storyboard-plan, repeat-extraction on a draft with existing blocks is rejected, non-owner is denied without revealing existence

tasks.title: Build worker cast-extract job: LLM proposal constrained by Zod cast schema, limit 12, scene-relevance ranking
tasks.dod: Job tests pass: script treated as data, output validated by the cast Zod schema, proposal capped at 12 keeping highest scene-appearance counts with an overflow notice, aggregate estimate computed, realtime event published, failure writes a plain-language error

tasks.title: Build confirm-cast service: blocks + flows + pending window rows, aggregate estimate, dispatch first N (user concurrencyLimit)
tasks.dod: Integration tests pass: confirm transactionally creates one block per entry with a 1:1 pre-filled flow and proposed scene links, marks all first runs pending in cast order, enqueues exactly min(N, cast) generations where N comes from user_settings (default 4), and charges nothing at confirm time

tasks.title: Add rolling-window completion-hook to the ai-generate worker job
tasks.dod: Job tests pass: on first-run completion the block flips to done/failed (failed keeps a plain-language reason), the next pending block of the same draft is atomically claimed and enqueued, other blocks are unaffected, redelivery never double-charges or double-claims

tasks.title: Build block-lifecycle service: manual add (no run, no charge), update, delete (flow survives), retry, versioned scene-link save
tasks.dod: Integration tests pass: manual add creates an empty linked flow with window_status NULL and no charge, delete removes the block + its links while the flow and results survive, retry re-dispatches a failed first run, scene-link save with a stale version returns a conflict and a fresh version succeeds, all owner-scoped

tasks.title: Build star service: versionless atomic toggle, primary designation, preview fallback, cleanup sync on result/file deletion
tasks.dod: Integration tests pass: star/unstar are idempotent commutative toggles, primary star designation is atomic, removing the primary falls back to another star or the no-preview state, deleting a flow result/file removes its star rows synchronously, non-owner denied

tasks.title: Enforce the star gate in the storyboard illustration service (full-set, per-scene scope, zero-blocks pass)
tasks.dod: Tests pass: full-set start with any unstarred block is rejected naming exactly the missing blocks (a no-results block counts as missing and the message includes retry/delete exits), single-scene regeneration checks only blocks linked to that scene, a draft with zero reference blocks passes

tasks.title: Apply the reference boundary in the worker scene generation master: primary + top-up selection, draft-global derived style description
tasks.dod: Job tests pass: scene X uses only starred images of blocks linked to X (primary first, topped up to model reference capacity), unlinked blocks' images never leak into X, scenes with no linked blocks share one draft-global style description derived from starred results with script fallback when no stars exist

tasks.title: Derive the draft badge, delete-flow warning + no-flow state, draft-deletion survival, duplication unlink + checkpoint re-validation
tasks.dod: Integration tests pass: flow list exposes the badge derived from the block link, deleting a linked flow requires confirmation and leaves the block in the no-flow state, deleting a draft leaves flows intact with badges gone, duplicating a draft unlinks copied blocks, checkpoint restore re-validates links marking missing flows as no-flow

tasks.title: Expose extraction + confirm endpoints (routes, controller, Zod schemas) per the OpenAPI contract
tasks.dod: Controller tests pass: startCastExtraction / getCastExtraction / confirmCast match contracts/openapi.yaml shapes and status codes, repeat extraction returns the contract error, non-owner gets the not-found-style denial

tasks.title: Expose block CRUD, retry, scene-links and star endpoints per the OpenAPI contract
tasks.dod: Controller tests pass: listReferenceBlocks / createReferenceBlock / updateReferenceBlock / deleteReferenceBlock / retryReferenceBlockGeneration / saveSceneLinks (409 on stale version) / starReferenceResult / unstarReferenceResult match contracts/openapi.yaml, all owner-scoped

tasks.title: Build the ReferenceBlockNode on the Video Road Map canvas: preview, window statuses + retry, no-flow state, open-flow navigation, manual add
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: block renders primary-star preview or placeholder, shows pending/running/failed (failed with reason + retry), no-flow state is visually distinct, clicking opens the linked flow in the same tab, the canvas offers manual character/environment block creation, realtime status events update the node

tasks.title: Build the SceneLinkSelector multi-select + visible linked-scenes list with 409 reload prompt
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: selector lists draft scenes with multi-select add/remove, the block shows its visible linked-scenes list, save sends the block version and a 409 response shows the reload prompt without silently dropping edits, deleted scenes disappear from the list

tasks.title: Build the cast confirmation modal (review/edit entries, images, scene links, aggregate estimate) and replace the principal-image entry point
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: starting reference generation launches extraction with realtime progress, the proposal is editable in place (names, descriptions, image assignment, scene links via SceneLinkSelector), the cap-overflow notice renders, confirm shows the aggregate estimate, drafts with existing blocks never see the extraction action, and the principal-image approval UI is removed

tasks.title: Add star + primary-star controls to the flow ResultNode with block-preview sync
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: results in a reference flow show star toggle and primary designation, starring/un-starring updates optimistically and converges with the server, removing the primary reflects the fallback preview, non-reference flows show no star controls

tasks.title: Show the draft badge in the flow list, the delete-flow dependency warning, and the back-to-storyboard action
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: reference flows carry their draft badge in the Generate AI list, deleting such a flow shows the dependency warning and proceeds only after confirmation, a flow opened from a block shows a back-to-storyboard action returning to the same draft

tasks.title: Render the star-gate message with exit actions and add the concurrency-limit setting UI
tasks.dod: Component tests pass: a blocked scene-preview start names exactly the unstarred blocks with retry/delete exits in plain language, and the settings surface exposes the rolling-window concurrency limit (default 4) persisted via updateMySettings

tasks.title: Add the cross-layer e2e journey: extract → confirm → window → stars → gate → boundary-respecting scenes
tasks.dod: Playwright e2e passes: a seeded Creator runs extraction, confirms the cast, watches blocks fill via the rolling window, stars results, is blocked then passed by the star gate, generates boundary-respecting scenes; a second user is denied access; draft deletion leaves flows in the list
